title: Specify target build report
description: Closed-shape per-slice build report returned by a target adapter to `specify slice build`. `status` is `success` or `failure`; partial success is `success` carrying non-blocking findings only (per the `blocking` predicate). The CLI rejects `status: success` reports carrying any blocking-severity finding (`target-build-success-with-blocking-finding`). `findings[]` elements are governed by `diagnostic.schema.json` (relative `$ref` resolved against this schema's directory).

slice.description: Slice that was built; must match the request.

status.description: `success` or `failure`. Partial success is `success` with non-blocking findings only.

findings.description: Diagnostics; default `[]`. On `success`, only non-blocking findings (or empty). On `failure`, populated with blocking (`critical` / `important`) violations when the target can map them.

outputs.description: Per-platform build outputs produced by the target adapter. Each entry declares a platform and a relative path (from project-dir) to the produced artifact. The CLI finalize gate verifies every declared path exists and is non-empty (`target-build-output-missing`).

platform.description: Closed target platform enum. Mirrors the `platform` $def in `target.schema.json`.
Platform this output was produced for.

path.description: Relative path (from project-dir) to the produced artifact. The CLI finalize gate verifies each path exists and is non-empty.
